subject: Nippon India Mutual Fund Monthly Portfolio Disclosure - August, 2025
body:
Dear Investor,
Greetings from Nippon India Mutual Fund!
In compliance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/IMD/IMD–II DOF3/P/CIR/2021/555 dated April 29, 2021 and SEBI/HO/IMD/IMD–II DOF3/P/CIR/2021/621 dated August 31, 2021 on disclosure of Monthly statement of scheme portfolio via email only for schemes which are subscribed by you, kindly click at the below mentioned scheme-wise links to access the same for the month of August, 2025. This initiative of sending the Monthly Portfolio of the schemes of Nippon India Mutual Fund via email is taken in pursuance to SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/IMD/DF2/CIR/P/2018/92 dated June 05, 2018, on disclosing and providing information to unitholders. 
Following is the list of the respective schemes, click and view:




NIPPON INDIA ETF GOLD BEES




As per Circular released by AMFI - 35P/ MEM-COR/ 55/2025-2026 dated August 26th 2025, AMCs must include an additional link in the monthly portfolio disclosure emails sent to investors showing returns data. The same can be found at-  https://mf.nipponindiaim.com/investor-service/quick-links/returns-data 
Kindly note, in case you wish to access historic Monthly Portfolio Disclosure click here  and view the same on the Nippon India Mutual Fund (NIMF) website. 
For any assistance, please get in touch with your Mutual Fund Distributor / nearest Investor Service Centre or contact us on 1860 266 0111* (Monday to Saturday from 8 am to 9 pm) or write to us at customercare@nipponindiaim.in
To have a hassle free transacting experience with Nippon India Mutual Fund, you can avail the following services:  



  
 Whatsapp Services Say "Hi" to us at 8433938264 from your registered mobile number to Initiate transactions | Get account balance | Get account statement | CGST 

  
 Self Service Get your account statement instantly 

  
 Missed call Services Give us a missed call at 9664001111 from your registered mobile no and get instant account balance via SMS on your registered Mobile Number 




Thank you for choosing to invest in Nippon India Mutual Fund. Sincerely , For Nippon India Mutual Fund  




 Contact your Mutual Fund Distributor
 









 


Scan the QR code to download our Investor App 


 

 Install Now
